title: Question Bank Schema
description: A bank of reusable questions tagged by subject, grade, topic, standard, difficulty, and Bloom level. Questions can be pulled into assessment and quiz output types or referenced inline.

topic.description: Broad topic or unit this bank supports.

question_id.description: Unique ID within the bank (e.g. 'ela10-arg-q01'). Used for pull:questions references.

q_text.description: The question text shown to students.

question_type.description: Question format. Maps to response_pattern for rendering.

difficulty.description: Relative difficulty within the subject/topic. Scaffolded = entry-level; core = grade-level; extension = challenge.

bloom_level.description: Bloom's Taxonomy level this question targets.

standards.description: Standard codes this question addresses (CCSS, BC curriculum, NGSS, etc.).

topic.description: Specific topic or concept within the bank's broader subject (e.g. 'thesis statement', 'area of composite shapes').

answer_key.description: Correct answer or model response. Rendered only on teacher-facing version.

marking_notes.description: Guidance for marking — what to look for, common errors, partial credit notes.

point_value.description: Point value for this question in a scored assessment. Omit for proficiency-only assessments.

n_lines.description: Number of response lines for open-format questions.

choices.description: Answer choices for multiple_choice and true_false questions.

render_hints.description: Optional render overrides — same surface as studentPdfTaskRenderHints.

source_package.description: package_id this question was originally authored in, if any.
